description: Monroe County's agricultural extension office has compiled soil test results and crop yield data from 150 farm plots for the 2023 growing season (~/Documents/Spreadsheets/county_soil_crop_data.csv). Perform a comprehensive agronomic analysis in ONLYOFFICE Spreadsheet Editor to create a multi-sheet fertilizer/lime advisory workbook saved to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/soil_crop_analysis.xlsx. The workbook should include summary statistics (minimum, maximum, and mean yield) for Corn, Soybeans, and Winter Wheat, and categorize soil nutrients using specific thresholds: pH (< 5.5 Low/Needs Lime, 5.5-7.0 Optimal, > 7.0 High), Phosphorus (< 15 ppm Low, 15-30 ppm Medium, > 30 ppm Optimal), and Potassium (< 120 ppm Low, 120-170 ppm Medium, > 170 ppm Optimal). The analysis must document the correlation between soil properties and yields, identify specific plots with nutrient deficiencies, and provide actionable recommendations such as "Apply Lime", "Apply P2O5", or "Apply K2O/Potash". Organize the final analysis professionally across at least 2-3 sheets.

metadata.data_source: Generated Monroe County Precision Agriculture Dataset
